BindEip.eip: The EIP to bind, including IPv4 and IPv6 EIPs.
BindEip.clientToken: Idempotency token, see [Idempotency](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
BindEip.instanceType: Type of the instance to bind.
BindEip.instanceId: ID of the instance to bind.
BindEip.instanceIp: IP within the instance to associate with the EIP.
